claims.statement: VaultFileRecord.withId returns a new VaultFileRecord using updatedId and the existing originalName, storedName, mimeType, sizeBytes, ivBase64, and createdAt values.
claims.source_quote: return new VaultFileRecord(updatedId, originalName, storedName, mimeType, sizeBytes, ivBase64, createdAt);

entities.name: withId
entities.description: Function that returns a copy with a new id.
